Package com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXAdditionalWireLengthConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows the length of a wire to be controlled during routing.
    IXAssignConductorsToHoleConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the routing of conductors to a given hole
    IXAssignConnectorConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to assign a connector of a logical device to a virtual connector of a slot during place device actions for footprint devices
    IXAttributesResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - Interface for returning attributes and properties to be set on object passed into the calling constraint.
    IXBackshellTerminationConstraint
    Custom Constraint use to control backshell termination
    IXCavityDetailConstraintResult
    Result object that contains a set of wire combinations, each combination is a set of wires.
    IXCavityDetailGeneratorConstraint  
    IXCavityMappingConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the routing of wires of a given signal.
    IXCavityMappingResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - for specifying cavities related to the IXCavityMappingConstraint.
    IXCenterStripResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - for specifying the parant wire of center of a signal with center stripped splices
    IXCenterStripSpliceConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the conversion of splices to center-stripped.
    IXCombinedDevice
    Custom Constraint Return Object - for specifying a single device to be combined
    IXCombineDeviceResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - for specifying devices to be combined
    IXConductorCombinationConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to specify combination of wires.
    IXConductorCombinationResult
    Wire Combination Custom Constraint Return Object - for specifying the results of a IXConductorCombinationConstraint.
    IXConnectivityObjectResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - for specifying a connectivity object
    IXConstraint
    Base class for all constraints.
    IXCostInlineJunctionBoxConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows custom calculation of the cost of an Inline or Junction Box during routing.
    IXCostMultitermConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows custom calculation of the cost of multiterms during routing.
    IXCostResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - Set the cost of where this constraint applies
    IXCostSpliceConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows custom calculation of "Cost of splice" during routing
    IXCostWireConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows custom calculation of "Cost of wire per unit length" during routing
    IXCountResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - the max number to be allowed where this constraint applies
    IXCreateBypassWiringConstraint
    Custom Constraint - which will be able to protect a splice from being processed by automated bypass wire generation.
    IXDoDontResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - a "Do or Don't" directive where this constraint applies
    IXFootprintConstraint
    Custom Constraint - The custom constraint that can be used to assign a footprint from the Library that would actually define the mapping between the slot device’s pins to cavities of the slot’s connectors for given slot device and the slot.
    IXFootprintResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - It will hold the mapping information between slot device pins and connectors on the slot.
    IXFunctionalModuleAssignationConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific design or set of object should be assigned functional module codes.
    IXFunctionalModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned functional module codes.
    IXFunctionalModuleAssignationResult
    Module Assignation Result - holds the return set for module assignation of functional module codes
    IXFunctionalModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned functional technical module codes.
    IXGroundCombinationConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to specify ground device combination in ground slots during a "Combine All Grounds" action
    IXLengthResult  
    IXMapToSameCavityBySignalConstraint
    Custom Constraint used for re-using a cavity by multiple pins with the same signal for device placement in a slot.
    IXMaxCavitiesPerGroundConnectorConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the number of cavities in the connectors of ground slots
    IXMaxGroundSignalsPerMultitermConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the number of signals to the cavities of ground slot connectors during automated ground combination.
    IXMaxWiresPerMultitermConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of number of wires that can multiterm at a cavity
    IXMaxWiresPerSpliceConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of number of wires that can be spliced in a given bundle
    IXMinSpliceDistanceConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of minimum distance between splices to other design objects during automatic splice placement
    IXMinSpliceDistanceResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - hold a return value for a constraint on an object type that is also specified.
    IXMinSpliceSeparationConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of minimum distance between splices within a bundle or bundle region
    IXModuleAssignationConstraint<XMC extends IXModuleCode>
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific set of selected objects, or all objects in the current design should be assigned module codes as part of the Capital ModularXC assignation action.
    IXModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint<XMC extends IXModuleCode>
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned module codes as part of the Capital ModularXC assignation action.
    IXModuleAssignationResult<XMC extends IXModuleCode>
    Module Assignation Result - holds the return set for module assignation.
    IXModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint<XMC extends IXModuleCode>
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned technical module codes.
    IXMulticoreAttributeConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to manage attributes and properties of a Muticore
    IXMulticoreTakeoutConstraint
    Custom Constraint - allows custom specification of the maximum multicore takeout length constraint for a wire or shield signal during routing.
    IXMultitermGroundDevicesConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the number of cavities in the connectors of ground slots during a "Combine All Grounds" action
    IXMultitermSignalResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - for multi-terming device signals
    IXNetToWireConstraint
    Custom Constraint - Used to exclude nets/multicores from conversion to wires in the corresponding Capital Logic action.
    IXNetworkSpecificationConstraint
    Custom Constraint - allows custom specification of the Network Specification constraints for a top-level multicore or signal during routing.
    IXNetworkSpecificationResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - Set the Network Specification for top-level multicores and signals where this constraint applies.
    IXNetworkTerminationConstraint
    Custom Constraint used to allow cavities to be considered IxO terminated for specific signals/multicores
    IXOnlyDontResult  
    IXOptionExpressionResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - a string representing a valid option expression in the current context
    IXOptionPlacementConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control device placement in slots places device with option/variant expressions
    IXPigtailUsageConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to indicate if a pigtail should be used for shield termination.
    IXPlaceInlineHalfConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control logical inline half placement in topology inline halves
    IXPlacementConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control device placement in slots
    IXPlaceSpliceOnBundleConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control splice placement in bundles
    IXProductionModuleAssignationConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific design or set of object should be assigned production module codes.
    IXProductionModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned functional module codes.
    IXProductionModuleAssignationResult
    Module Assignation Result - holds the return set for module assignation of production module code
    IXProductionModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned production technical module codes.
    IXProtectSignalWiringConstraint
    Custom constraint used to prevent modification of wiring by the following operations Abstract Wiring Synthesis Composite Wiring Synthesis (when both "Clear Promoted Options" and "Delete all Wiring, Harness Levels and Configurations" are unchecked) Generate Option Expressions Synthesize All Wiring Delete All Wiring Generate Center-Strip Splices Please note that other operation may modify the wiring.
    IXRoutingConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the routing of wires of a given signal
    IXSeparationResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - hold a return value for a constraint on an object type that is also specified.
    IXSetAttributeConstraint
    Custom Constraint - Used to set attributes and properties on objects that match the constraint.
    IXSingleEndedCoresConstraint
    Custom Constraint - allows custom specification of whether the wires or shields of signals in a multicore should be terminated when they do not connect to a conenctor
    IXSpliceAttributeConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to manage attributes and properties of a splice
    IXSplicePositionBundleExclusionConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of automatically positioning splices on bundles
    IXSplicePositionCostConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of "cost" weighting factor for a splice's wire conductors.
    IXSubAssemblyNameConstraint
    Custom Constraint - Used to name sub-assemblies in the SBOM
    IXSubAssemblyPartNumberConstraint
    Custom Constraint - Used to name sub-assembly part numbers in the SBOM
    IXTechnicalCombination<XMC extends IXModuleCode>
    This interface is used to describe the definition of a technical module code.
    IXTerminateShieldToPigtailConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the positioning of pigtail wires of a given shield.
    IXTopologyMinSpliceSeparationConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of minimum distance between splices within a bundle in Capital Topology
    IXTopologyRoutingConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the routing of conductors in Capital Topology
    IXValueResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - hold a String return value for a constraint on an object.
    IXWireAttributeConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to manage attributes and properties of a wire
    IXWireLengthResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - holds a return value for Length Change attributes of a wire where this constraint applies.
    IXWireRoutingConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control the routing of wires through a given bundle.
    IXWireTerminalSpecConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to set values of StartTerminalSpec and EndTerminalSpec
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    IXDoDontResult.DoDont  
    IXMinSpliceDistanceResult.IXMinSpliceDistanceType
    The type of harness object that the constraint applies to
    IXOnlyDontResult.OnlyDont
    Custom Constraint Return Object - Set a Do/Dont directive when a constraint is active
    IXSeparationResult.IXSeparationType
    Type of object to be given this constraint
    IXWireLengthResult.IXLengthChangeType
